name: Vitamin E+B3 Clear & Glow Face Wash
short: A clarifying face wash with Vitamin E, niacinamide, and AHA+BHA to unclog pores, fight acne, and brighten skin.
description: Vitamin E+B3 Clear & Glow is a clarifying daily face wash that combines the brightening power of niacinamide (Vitamin B3) with the soothing, antioxidant protection of Vitamin E. A blend of glycolic, lactic, and salicylic acids gently exfoliates and unclogs pores, while aloe vera keeps skin comfortable. Cellulose beads provide a satisfying physical polish that rinses clean away. Use daily for visibly clearer, smoother, more radiant skin.
benefits: Unclogs pores with AHA+BHA blend (glycolic, lactic, salicylic)
Niacinamide brightens and Vitamin E protects
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Suitable for combination, oily, and blemish-prone skin.

customerReviews.title: Amazing Results with Regular Use!
customerReviews.body: I’ve been using APS Majeste E + B3 Clear & Glow Face Wash for a few weeks now, and I’m genuinely impressed with the results. The combination of Vitamin E and Vitamin B3 (Niacinamide) makes my skin feel clean, fresh, and hydrated after every wash. It removes excess oil and dirt effectively without making the skin feel dry or stretched.

customerReviews.title: Nice product feel light on skin after regular use
customerReviews.body: Tried APS Majeste E + B3 Clear & Glow Face Wash recently and it turned out better than expected. It cleans the face properly, especially after a long day, but doesn’t leave that dry or rough feeling behind. Skin feels normal and fresh, which is a plus point.

customerReviews.title: Amazing result
customerReviews.body: I am writing this review after using from few weeks.it's a reliable, everyday staple for sensitive and combination skin.
